description_long: This rifle features a long, slender black barrel with a wooden stock that appears ergonomically shaped for shoulder support. The barrel is topped with a simple iron sight and ends with a blue-tipped muzzle device, possibly a safety cap or training indicator. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly visible beneath the main body, and the overall design is reminiscent of a classic bolt-action or air rifle. The stock is a rich brown color, contrasting with the matte black finish of the barrel and receiver. The rifle lacks any visible external magazine, suggesting an internal or single-shot mechanism. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of metal and wood materials.
description: A classic-style rifle with a long black barrel, wooden stock, and blue-tipped muzzle device. Features iron sights and a streamlined, robust design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, black barrel, and blue-tipped muzzle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle with blue tip and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the wooden stock, black barrel, and blue-tipped muzzle, with the trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the blue muzzle tip visible at the far end.
